name: Sorting Algorithm
description: Test understanding of bubble sort algorithm tracing
prompt:
Apa output dari kode Python berikut?

```python
def bubble_sort(arr):
    n = len(arr)
    swaps = 0
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(0, n-i-1):
            if arr[j] > arr[j+1]:
                arr[j], arr[j+1] = arr[j+1], arr[j]
                swaps += 1
    return swaps

data = [64, 34, 25, 12, 22]
jumlah_swap = bubble_sort(data)
print(jumlah_swap)
```
